This '''pleasure cruiser''' was a civilian luxury craft piloted by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Quasar (Human)|Quasar]].

On one voyage near the [[Merson asteroid belt]] during the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], a group of [[Merson pirates/Legends|Merson pirates]] attacked the cruiser. Fortunately one of the passengers aboard was [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] who used his skill to destroy the aggressors even with the modest firepower of the cruiser.

{{Ship-stub}}
